name: base_2b(X, b, out_len)
label: Algorithm 4

inputs.name: X
inputs.description: Input byte string, at least ⌈out_len * b / 8⌉ bytes long

inputs.name: b
inputs.description: Number of bits per base-2^b digit

inputs.name: out_len
inputs.description: Number of base-2^b digits to output

outputs.name: baseb
outputs.description: Array of out_len integers in range [0, 2^b - 1], base-2^b representation of X

body_raw: for out from 0 to out_len - 1 do
